scenarios.description: sourceRange delegates to parent.sourceRange(key) when parent is non-null (branch parent!=null)
scenarios.precondition: Attributes stubParent overrides sourceRange to return a sentinel Range.AttributeRange
scenarios.expectedResult: returns the exact sentinel instance provided by stubParent.sourceRange
